title: TC01: Invalid SQL query triggers hero error state with fix-query action card
verifies: invalid SQL query renders QueryErrorState with fix-query card, detail panel, and hides search results

title: TC02: Error detail panel toggles expand/collapse
verifies: clicking the detail toggle button expands and collapses the error detail body

title: TC03: Copy error button copies details and shows 'Copied!' feedback
verifies: copy button shows Copied! text on click and reverts after 2s timeout

title: TC04: Filter validation error displays generic error state (no action cards)
verifies: nonexistent field filter in Quick mode triggers generic error state with no action cards

title: TC05: 'Fix the query' action card click focuses the SQL editor
verifies: clicking fix-query card focuses the Monaco SQL editor

title: TC06: Error state title and description match the error code
verifies: error state displays meaningful i18n title/description and non-empty summary line

title: TC07-fixme: Ask AI button — gated on enterprise edition (UNWIRED in OSS) — evidence: QueryErrorState.vue:782-793
verifies: Ask AI button visibility (gated on config.isEnterprise, fixme in OSS)

title: TC08-fixme: Block layout — not wired into Logs plugin (UNWIRED in logs) — evidence: LogsErrorState.vue hardcodes size="hero"
verifies: block layout selectors (query-error-summary, fix-query-btn) when size=block wired
